Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}Deliverance is coming soon. Did you know that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}The Absolute Will is coming from the sky to save us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}You, too, should join us. Cleanse your impure mind and wait for the time to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}He understands my pain and has answers to all my questions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}Thanks to him, I have accepted the teachings of Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}If only I had the words to explain to you how wonderful it feels...[n]{f 1 1}
